__fixture_tag__: VENDORED UNIVERSAL-FF PREDICTION — frozen NNP output, not measurement
target_property: OER overpotential η at j = 10 mA/cm^2 (geometric) for Ir0.7Ru0.3O2 anode in 0.5 M H2SO4 (PEM-electrolyzer acidic OER)
model_caveat: MACE / universal NNPs predict per-atom energies + forces on the IrO2 + RuO2 mixed-oxide surface; OER overpotential is then derived from adsorption-energy descriptors (Nørskov scaling: ΔG_OH, ΔG_O, ΔG_OOH on rutile (110)) + reaction-free-energy diagram. The 230 mV value here is a PROXY-from-literature pinned with raw#10 C3 honesty: reported lab RDE overpotentials for Ir-Ru mixed oxides at 10 mA/cm^2 geometric in acidic OER. SEMI-QUANTITATIVE — Nørskov-scaling DFT is itself ± 50 mV uncertain.
proxy_source: Kim et al. 2017 Nat. Commun. 8:1449 (Ir-Ru mixed oxide PEM OER η ~ 230 mV @ 10 mA/cm^2) + Reier, Nong, Teschner, Schlogl, Strasser 2017 ACS Catal. 7:6608 (IrO2 / RuO2 surface OER mechanism + scaling-relation review) + Strasser 2023 Chem. Rev. (loading-reduction roadmap; 0.1 mg-Ir/cm^2 is open research target, NOT closed) + Bernt 2018 J. Electrochem. Soc. (Ir global supply / loading × area mathematics)
falsifier_target_unit: mV (η at 10 mA/cm^2 in 0.5 M H2SO4)
falsifier_text: η @ 10 mA/cm² > 250 mV OR Ir loading > 1 mg/cm² for commodity scale → FAIL
unproven_markers_preserved: Ir scarcity HARD_WALL — global Ir production ~ 8 t/yr, PEM electrolyzer roll-out to 100 GW would require ≥ 30 t-Ir/yr at 1 mg/cm² loading
Ru leaching in acidic OER conditions HARD_WALL (Ru → RuO4 volatile loss)
long-term oxide-support corrosion at j > 2 A/cm² UNVERIFIED above 50 000 h commercial-warranty target
loading-reduction to 0.1 mg/cm² is an active research target but NOT a closed milestone (Strasser 2023 Chem. Rev.)
honesty_caveats: Both falsifier branches PASS at the proxy literature values (η 230 mV < 250 mV target; loading 0.5 mg-Ir/cm^2 < 1 mg/cm^2 target). However Ir scarcity HARD_WALL is the binding economic limit — even at 0.5 mg/cm^2 the 100 GW PEM target needs 15 t-Ir/yr against 8 t/yr global production. Ru leaching HARD_WALL means short-term η measurement does NOT predict 50 000 h durability. SPEC_FIRST preserved — does NOT promote to EXTERNAL-VERIFIED. Cell-level integration → hexa-energy per CROSS_LINK §3.3.
license_note: Peer-reviewed paper values per CC-BY publisher terms; vendor authority ITM Power / Plug Power / Cummins PEM electrolyzer baselines + IRENA 2020 Ir-supply analysis (raw#10 C3, NOT n=6 lattice-fit).
